stories.headline: KelpDAO LayerZero Bridge Drained for $292M, Wrapping 18% of rsETH Across 20 Chains
stories.tldr: An attacker exploited KelpDAO's LayerZero-powered bridge to siphon roughly 116,500 rsETH — about $292M and 18% of circulating supply.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: This is 2026's biggest DeFi exploit and it weaponized the cross-chain rails everyone is leaning on for restaking liquidity.
the_details: Hack hit on April 18, draining 116,500 rsETH (~$292M) routed through KelpDAO's LayerZero bridge across 20 chains.
Lazarus Group is the leading suspect, according to multiple onchain investigators citing reused laundering patterns.
Combined with the April 1 Drift hit, two attacks now account for ~95% of April's $606M in stolen crypto.

stories.headline: SEC Greenlights Unregistered DeFi Front-Ends in April 13 Staff Statement
stories.tldr: SEC staff said it will not object to certain UI providers facilitating crypto-asset securities transactions without broker-dealer registration.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: It's the clearest no-action signal yet that the post-Project Crypto SEC will let DeFi front-ends operate without dealer licenses.
the_details: Statement issued April 13, 2026, covers software interfaces that prepare and submit crypto-asset securities orders.
Conditions include no custody, no order matching, and no individualized investment advice from the interface operator.
Companion piece to the March 17 SEC-CFTC joint framework, which superseded the 2019 SEC token taxonomy.

stories.headline: Bitcoin Heads for Best Month in a Year as USDT Supply Adds $5B in April
stories.tldr: BTC is up roughly 13.6% in April with USDT issuance climbing $5B toward $150B, fueling the rebound off the $68K support shelf.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Stablecoin minting at this pace is the cleanest leading indicator of dry powder waiting to chase upside if Fed messaging stays soft.
the_details: BTC holding near $77K, on pace for its strongest monthly print since April 2025.
USDT supply approaching $150B; Tether minted ~$5B fresh tokens in April alone.
Next resistance pegged at $79K; Fed meeting later this week is the main macro pivot.

stories.headline: Spot Solana ETFs Cross $1B AUM as Goldman Quietly Builds $108M Position
stories.tldr: U.S. spot SOL ETFs have surpassed $1B in assets with $35.17M of net inflows last week and a disclosed $108M Goldman Sachs allocation.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A bulge-bracket bank publicly long SOL gives institutional sales desks the green light to start pitching alt-L1 exposure.
the_details: Five consecutive sessions of net inflows, $35.17M added across spot SOL products last week.
Goldman Sachs disclosed a roughly $108M position via 13F-style filing.
SOL trading at $86.45 with a $49.8B market cap; Alpenglow consensus upgrade still on deck for 2026.

stories.headline: Bhutan Moves Another 250 BTC, Pushing 2026 Sovereign Outflows Past $240M
stories.tldr: Arkham flagged a 250 BTC transfer from Bhutan's sovereign wallets, lifting year-to-date outflows above $240M from a stack down 73% from the Oct 2024 peak.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The first sovereign Bitcoin treasury is steadily de-risking — a quiet counterweight to the U.S. strategic-reserve narrative.
the_details: April 13 transfer of 250 BTC tracked onchain by Arkham Intelligence.
2026 outflows now top $240M; Bhutan's stack is 73% off its October 2024 peak.
No public statement on whether sales are funding budget needs or treasury rotation.
